digest.greeting: Jean, today closed a strong set of dashboard follow-ups across Sara's CoE metrics request, Staff Augmentation prep, Detention Prevention approvals, PM Workshop planning, Craft.io, and the Litify field-audit path. The remaining carry-forward is focused: keep the Venn ticket escalation consolidated and shape Friday's EPMO presentation.

items.label: Confirmed Sara's CoE leadership metrics
items.detail: The Sara follow-up is now closed after the morning digest captured the leadership metrics ask and Mar's draft figures: CoE began April 15, completed three sprints, and showed 17 completed, 6 active, and 25 queued projects.

items.label: Turned the Staff Augmentation risk into a clearer ask
items.detail: The Staff Augmentation prep item is now closed after today's touchpoint focused on IT ownership, Rippling/Microsoft 365 scope, and how to frame the risk for leadership.

items.label: Closed the Detention Prevention approval follow-up
items.detail: The Detention Prevention item is now closed after the morning digest flagged the pilot-development move under the ICE Preparedness Plan name and the remaining approval owners.

items.label: Confirmed the next PM Workshop path
items.detail: The PM Workshop follow-up is now closed after Jean named Jhara and Mar as leads and asked Jhara to schedule the next workshop for next week.

items.label: Closed the Craft.io beta access reply
items.detail: The Craft.io follow-up is now closed after the morning digest flagged Thomas's request for the specific workspaces or feedback portals the read-only token should cover.

items.label: Closed the Litify field-audit follow-up
items.detail: The Litify field-audit item is now closed after Andrea's steps were captured for checking field creation or last-modified details through Salesforce setup.

items.label: Collect Venn ticket numbers for one escalation path
items.detail: Keep one clean list of each TM's Venn ticket number, current blocker, and whether Venn is threatening closure so Danny, Nico, or IT can work from one consolidated view.

items.label: Prepare the Friday EPMO presentation
items.detail: Use the remaining prep time to decide the storyline, choose the proof points from Sara's CoE metrics request, and decide whether Staff Augmentation or Detention Prevention should be framed as wins, risks, or follow-ups.

items.label: Jessica will test supplements and renewals for Phase 2 SMS
items.detail: Jessica Richburg replied that she can be listed as the primary tester for supplements and renewals in the Phase 2 SMS Expansion work.

items.label: 1:1 Andrea and Jean
items.detail: Useful follow-up spot for the Litify field-audit path and any USCIS taskset or UAT questions still open.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected prep space before BCP/Incident Response and the afternoon run.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Bring any survey, follow-up, or risk items that need to stay visible after this week's portfolio updates.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: Outlook shows the renewed 1:1 series continuing tomorrow, which gives a good window for CoE metrics, EPMO presentation framing, and any leadership-ready updates.

items.label: Staff Augmentation - Next Steps
items.detail: Nadia's invite frames this as the broader unblock conversation with IT. Bring the IT-owner question, Rippling/Microsoft 365 scope, and the court-volume risk framing.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Team coordination forum for roadblocks, workshop follow-through, and EPMO operating updates.
